subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath verily been sent down in truth unto them that know there is none other God but Him - His is the creation and the command, and all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله قد نزل بالحق لقوم یعلمون انه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل
subcodes.subjects: @idle fancies; lust and passion, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
